battery_saver.label: Battery Saver
battery_saver.description: Coolest and quietest local setup for imports and everyday categorization.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Best everyday default for local Ollama on laptops.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: Stronger Copilot answers while keeping categorization thermally sane.

llama3.2:3b.label: Llama 3.2 3B
llama3.2:3b.warning: Smaller general-purpose model; best when you want speed and lower thermals.

phi4-mini.label: Phi-4 Mini
phi4-mini.warning: Strong small-model reasoning; good Copilot default on lower-memory machines.

qwen2.5:3b.label: Qwen 2.5 3B
qwen2.5:3b.warning: Good small multilingual option with very manageable local footprint.

qwen3:4b.label: Qwen 3 4B
qwen3:4b.warning: A strong modern small-model option when you want better headroom than 3B models.

gemma4:e2b.label: Gemma 4 E2B
gemma4:e2b.warning: Viable on 8 GB laptops, but near the upper edge of comfortable local memory use.

gemma4:e4b.label: Gemma 4 E4B
gemma4:e4b.warning: Primary Folio recommendation for 16 GB laptops.

gemma3:4b.label: Gemma 3 4B
gemma3:4b.warning: Reliable smaller Gemma-family option when you want cooler sustained runs.

qwen2.5:7b.label: Qwen 2.5 7B
qwen2.5:7b.warning: Excellent balanced choice for 16 GB and 32 GB laptops, especially for Copilot.

qwen3:8b.label: Qwen 3 8B
qwen3:8b.warning: Better suited to richer Copilot interactions than long categorization imports.

deepseek-r1:8b.label: DeepSeek-R1 8B
deepseek-r1:8b.warning: Reasoning-heavy model; not recommended for bulk categorization on laptops.

gemma4:26b.label: Gemma 4 26B
gemma4:26b.warning: Excellent 32 GB Copilot choice, but intentionally not a default categorization model.

gemma4:31b.label: Gemma 4 31B
gemma4:31b.warning: Fits on some 32 GB machines, but it is intentionally expert-only and not chosen automatically.

gemma3:12b.label: Gemma 3 12B
gemma3:12b.warning: Good upper-mid option when you want better quality without jumping to the hottest local models.

qwen2.5:14b.label: Qwen 2.5 14B
qwen2.5:14b.warning: Strong 32 GB Copilot option with good quality-to-size tradeoff.

qwen3:14b.label: Qwen 3 14B
qwen3:14b.warning: Better for richer assistant tasks than repetitive batch labeling.

mistral-small:24b.label: Mistral Small 24B
mistral-small:24b.warning: Powerful local Copilot model, but too heavy to recommend for sustained categorization on laptops.
